name: Gray Dot Dog Fold-Up Stroller for 14" - 16" Dolls - Gigglescape™: Recycled Materials, Powder-Coated Steel
description:
Your child will love taking good care of their favorite dolls with this Dot Dog Fold-Up Stroller from Gigglescape™. This stylish stroller for dolls or stuffed animals features an allover gray dotted pattern and a dog face on the hood for an adorable look. The fold-up stroller has easy-to-grab handles for comfortable steering down the hallway, while the two-point harness helps keep their doll snug and secure. Compatible with most 14–16 inch dolls, the stroller is easy to fold away for convenient storage.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
